title: alangium platanifolium var. trilobum
intro: Alangium platanifolium var. trilobum, also known as the Trilobed Alangium or Three-lobed Alangium, is a plant species belonging to the Alangiaceae family, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Alangium platanifolium var. trilobum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and wounds, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves, roots, and bark of the plant are used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
